goals: Explore the workspace directory to discover available resources and files
Search for specific files related to course work or assignments
Read relevant files to gather information or guidance
Create or save notes/draft content in the workspace

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but may be unfamiliar with the workspace system. Needs guidance and clear explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: New to the workspace system, doesn't know how to navigate or use file operations. Needs step-by-step guidance.

end_condition: The student has successfully explored the workspace, found relevant files, read them, and created their own content.
